human_actions_pending.context: Rebuilt with zero AVX-512, X11 wrapper, all browser CLI fixes
Original crash system — verify startup works

human_actions_pending.action: Delete vm-build branch if no longer needed
human_actions_pending.context: Baseline CPU is now default on develop

decisions.decision: Remove legacy flat Browser* CLI variants entirely
decisions.rationale: No backward compat needed on Linux — never shipped. Bloated enum caused clap startup crash.

decisions.decision: Translate CLI action names to agent-browser names in socket handler
decisions.rationale: cmux uses open/goto/eval, agent-browser uses navigate/evaluate — mismatch caused 'Not implemented' errors
Preview pane was created blank — users expect to see the page immediately

decisions.decision: Target baseline x86-64 CPU for all builds (Rust + Zig)
decisions.rationale: AVX-512 from build machine caused SIGILL on VMs, AMD Zen 2, and older Intel. Most x86-64 CPUs lack AVX-512.

decisions.decision: Dynamically find simdutf.o and libhighway.a in zig-cache
decisions.rationale: Cache hashes change on rebuild — hardcoded paths linked stale objects with AVX-512

decisions.decision: Add cmux-app wrapper script for GDK_BACKEND detection
decisions.rationale: GTK4 picks Wayland/EGL even on X11 sessions when Wayland libs present — NVIDIA GL context creation fails. Wrapper forces X11 backend.

decisions.decision: Auto-prepend https:// to browser open URLs
decisions.rationale: Users type 'cmux browser open slashdot.org' without scheme

next_action: Test rebuilt deb (dist/cmux_0.1.0_amd64.deb) on AMD/Ubuntu 24 and VM systems. If working, proceed to Phase 13: Portable Formats (AppImage + Flatpak) via /gsd:discuss-phase 13
context_notes: Phase 12.1 planning+execution completed. Post-execution session focused on real-world testing bugs: startup crash (bloated enum), browser command wiring (action name mismatches, missing streaming, eval param name), AVX-512 compatibility (baseline CPU, simdutf.o, libhighway.a), and NVIDIA GL context (X11 wrapper). All fixes committed. README rewritten for Linux. vm-build branch exists but is now redundant since baseline is default on develop.
